title: Not For You
body:
**WARNING: THIS MODPACK CAN PLAY LOUD NOISES, HAS FLASHING LIGHTS, AND HAS THE CAPABILITY TO CRASH YOUR GAME, BAN YOU FROM THE WORLD, SHAKE YOUR GAME WINDOW AND MAKE LWJGL ALERT POPUPS, MOST OF THESE CAN BE DISABLED IN THE BROKEN SCRIPT'S CONFIG.**

A psychological horror modpack for 1.21.1, attempting to replicate the look of Beta Minecraft.

The modpack was made with the goal of making the player feel a sensation of both nostalgia and paranoia, utilizing Nostalgic Tweaks, the Golden Days resource pack, and The Broken Script.

Features many quirks of its own, mixing both modern and old Minecraft.

The pack progresses **very** slowly, so don't be surprised if it takes an hour or two for it to start getting intense!

Multiplayer support: Playing on multiplayer is not suggested, but is supported via Luna, a world-sharing mod.

tldr: the broken script but with a new pretty cool atmosphere

Watch the trailer here:
